name: YouCanBook.me
description: YouCanBook.me — Online scheduling tool with iframe embed, REST API, and webhooks for automated booking workflows.

seo.title: YouCanBook.me — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: YouCanBook.me: YouCanBook.me — Online scheduling tool with iframe embed, REST API, and webhooks for automated booking workflows.

when_to_use: REST API for automated booking workflow integration
Iframe booking embed for service business website
Webhook trigger for CRM update on booking completion
Recurring scheduling for subscription coaching clients
Multi-staff booking page for team appointment calendar

pros: Simple iframe embed drops into any site
REST API and webhooks enable custom automation
Calendar sync works with Google and Microsoft
Team round-robin and pooled availability built-in
cons: Pricing per calendar gets expensive at scale
UI customization limited vs Cal.com or SavvyCal
Not really an API management tool despite listing
review.verdict: Solid booking widget with decent webhooks, but miscategorized as API management and pricier than OSS alternatives.
review.best_for: Small teams wanting a no-code scheduling page with webhook hooks into their CRM
review.not_for: Developers seeking true API management or anyone evaluating Calendly-class tools on price
